entities.girl: a girl in a pink swimsuit
entities.towel: a striped beach towel with sunglasses and a hat

scenes.title: The Beach
scenes.background_prompt: A sunny beach with golden sand, gentle ocean waves, scattered seashells, a large flat rock near the water, and a red cooler. Blue sky with white clouds. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A sunny beach with golden sand. A girl in a pink swimsuit with her hair in a ponytail kneels in the sand in the center, carefully building a tall sandcastle with turrets and a small moat. A white seagull with gray-tipped wings stands on a large flat rock near the water's edge to the left, looking out at the sea. To the right of the girl, a colorful striped beach towel in blue, white, and orange lies flat on the sand. On the towel sit a pair of dark sunglasses and a wide-brimmed straw hat, as if someone has just stepped away. A red cooler sits next to the towel. The towel clearly belongs to someone who is not present. Ocean waves lap gently at the shore in the background, and a few seashells are scattered across the sand. The sky is a vivid blue with puffy white clouds.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl in the center of the beach, kneeling and building a tall sandcastle. Place seagull on the large flat rock near the water (left), standing and looking out. Place towel to the right of the girl, flat on the sand with sunglasses and straw hat on it, as if someone just stepped away.
